CHANGE OF PLEA TX FILED
SFPD'S MOT FOR ORDER TO QUASH/MODIFY SDT FILED
DA'S OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S MOTION TO DEMUR TO COMPLAINT FILED

/CAL:SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE 1170(H)/X:KAI YUAN DELIVERS A VICTIM IMPACT STATEMENT IN COURT,/X:DEFENDANT'S VARIOUS CERTIFICATES OF COMPLETION & LETTERS OF PARTICIPATION ARE PRESENTED TO THE COURT & PLACED IN THE DOCKET,/AJW/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO FOUR (4) YEARS STATEPRISON, PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H), TO BE SERVED AS FOLLOWS:/X:FOUR (4) YEARSIN COUNTY JAIL; WITH 363 DAYS CTS;/CH1:CJ 4 Y/CTS:363/4019HALF/STATES/DNA//X:UPPER TERM,/X:TOTAL 4 YEARS STATE PRISON,/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT MUST COMPLETE A NINE (9)-MONTH DUI CLASS AND FIFTY (50) HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE DIRECTLY RELATED TO THE EDUCATION OF THE EFFECTS OF DRIVING UNDER THEINFLUENCE,/CTORD:THAT DEFENDANT'S HARVEY WAIVER FROM DISMISSED COUNTS 2, 3& 4 IS ACCEPTED; THE ISSUE OF RESTITUTION IS RESERVED/RESTV/VF4:280/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/PSR/BKFEE/COLLECT/PAR/X:DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE 1170(H),/

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/X PEOPLE MOVE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUN8 OF 191,5(B) PENAL CODE-FELONY; COURT GRANTS MOTION,/FAWA/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT'S HARVEY WAIVER IN COUNTS 2,3 & 4 REGARDING RESTITUTION IS ACCEPTED/ARBUCKLE/PRES:12-18-13/TWS/CONTD:SENTENCING ON 12-18-13/DOP/

/CAL:SFPD MOTION FOR ORDER TO QUASH OR MODIFY SUBPOENA/DAWT/X:ATTY, RONNIE WAGNER APPEARS OBO SFPD-LEGAL,/CTORD:THAT THE SFPD MOTION FOR ORDER TO QUASH OR MODIFY SUBPOENA IS MOOT, FOR REASONS STATED ON THE RECORD/CONTD:PRELIM HRG ON 11-07-13/TE:1 DAY/
